jobs.name: obsidian-memory-sync
jobs.prompt:
You are syncing Hermes agent memory to an Obsidian vault as a background maintenance task. Do the following steps silently -- no user interaction needed.

VAULT PATH: /mnt/c/Users/shuff57/Documents/Obsidian Vault

STEP 1: Read current Hermes memory state.
Use the memory tool (or read ~/.hermes/memory.json if it exists) to get all current memory entries for both 'memory' and 'user' targets.

STEP 2: Write/overwrite the memory note.
Write to: VAULT/Hermes/Memory.md
Format:
---
tags: [hermes/memory]
updated: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM
---

# Agent Memory

> Auto-synced from Hermes memory — last updated YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM

(one ## Entry N section per entry, content verbatim)

STEP 3: Write/overwrite the user profile note.
Write to: VAULT/Hermes/User Profile.md
Same format but tag hermes/user-profile and title "User Profile".

STEP 4: Search recent sessions (last 3) via session_search with no query (recent mode).
Append a ## Recent Sessions section to VAULT/Hermes/Memory.md listing the session titles and timestamps found.

STEP 5: Report what was written (filenames + line counts). Keep it brief.
